things.name: Bascarsija Bazaar
things.description: Ottoman bazaar at the heart of Sarajevo with coppersmith workshops and the famous Sebilj fountain

things.name: Latin Bridge
things.description: Ottoman bridge where Archduke Franz Ferdinand was assassinated, triggering World War I

things.name: Gazi Husrev-beg Mosque
things.description: Most important Ottoman-era mosque in the Balkans, built in 1531

things.name: Sarajevo War Tunnel Museum
things.description: Tunnel used to supply besieged Sarajevo during the 1992-95 siege

things.name: Old Town (Stari Grad)
things.description: Where East meets West - Catholic, Orthodox, Muslim and Jewish buildings within metres

things.name: City Hall (Vijecnica)
things.description: Magnificent pseudo-Moorish building destroyed in the siege and gloriously restored

things.name: Yellow Fortress (Zuta Tabija)
things.description: Ottoman fortress ruins with the best panoramic views over Sarajevo

things.name: National Museum of Bosnia
things.description: Country's oldest and largest museum with the priceless 14th-century Sarajevo Haggadah

things.name: Sacred Heart Cathedral
things.description: Neo-Gothic Catholic cathedral with the finest ecclesiastical interior in Sarajevo

things.name: Avaz Twist Tower
things.description: Striking 176m glass-and-steel skyscraper with an observation deck over the city
